common

Procs

proc `$`(sampler: TextureSampler): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc `[]`(node: Node; name: string): Node {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a child node by name. Source   Edit   
proc center(a: AABounds): Vec3 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the center of the axis-aligned bounding box. Source   Edit   
proc computeBounds(node: Node; trs = mat4()): Bounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Computes a stable center, size, and radius for a node tree. Source   Edit   
proc computeSmoothNormals(prim: Primitive) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates smooth normals by accumulating face normals per vertex. Source   Edit   
proc defaultTextureSampler(): TextureSampler {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc dumpTree(node: Node; indent: string = "") {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Prints the node tree for debugging. Source   Edit   
proc ensureNormals(node: Node) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generates smooth normals for any primitive in the tree that lacks them. Source   Edit   
proc findTransform(node, target: Node; transform = mat4(); world: var Mat4): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Finds the world transform for a node in a tree. Source   Edit   
proc getAABounds(node: Node; trs = mat4()): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get the axis-aligned bounding box of the node and its children. Source   Edit   
proc getAABoundsNode(node: Node; trs = mat4()): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get the axis-aligned bounding box of the node. Source   Edit   
proc getBoundingSphere(node: Node; trs = mat4()): BoundingSphere {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the bounding sphere of the node and its children. Source   Edit   
proc getBoundingSphereNode(node: Node; trs = mat4()): BoundingSphere {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the bounding sphere of the node. Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
proc linearMat3(transform: Mat4): Mat3 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the linear part of an affine transform. Source   Edit   
proc markGeometryDirty(primitive: Primitive) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Marks CPU geometry changed so the selected backend can refresh resources. Source   Edit   
proc markMaterialDirty(material: Material) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Marks CPU material data changed so the selected backend can refresh resources. Source   Edit   
proc markSceneDirty(file: GltfFile) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Marks CPU scene data changed so the selected backend can refresh resources. Source   Edit   
proc merge(a, b: AABounds): AABounds {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Merge two axis-aligned bounding boxes. Source   Edit   
proc merge(a, b: BoundingSphere): BoundingSphere {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Merge two bounding spheres. Source   Edit   
proc normalMatrix(transform: Mat4): Mat3 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the inverse-transpose matrix for transforming normals. Source   Edit   
proc primitiveModeName(mode: PrimitiveMode): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns a readable primitive mode label. Source   Edit   
proc radius(a: AABounds): float {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get the radius of the axis-aligned bounding box. Source   Edit   
proc shallowCopy(node: Node): Node {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Creates a shallow copy of a node. Source   Edit   
proc skinMatrices(root, node: Node): seq[Mat4] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Computes joint matrices for a skinned node. Source   Edit   
proc skinMatricesInto(root, node: Node; matrices: var seq[Mat4]) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Computes joint matrices for a skinned node into a retained buffer. Source   Edit

Updates world transforms for a node tree. Source   Edit

Walk the nodes tree and return a flat list of nodes. Source   Edit
